meaning: n.擦除器,尤指墨水消除剂,橡皮
examples: I hide the eraser in her boot.
On the teacher's desk there's an eraser.
Included with the Modbook Pro is a best-in-class digitizer pen with two programmable side buttons and digital eraser.
Delaware-based CATE, or Call and Text Eraser, has been offering a similar level of security since last year.
